name: startup_indoor_above_cool_sensors_closed
description: Startup comfort recovery when indoor above comfort_cool and sensors closed

verdict.summary: On startup when indoor exceeds comfort_cool with sensors closed and nat-vent inactive, ceiling guard fires AC for comfort recovery
verdict.observed_behavior: startup state with indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F, sensors closed, nat_vent_active=False
verdict.expected_behavior: ceiling_guard fires, HVAC set to cool at comfort_cool

events.note: Warm day restart: indoor 76F above comfort_cool 74F, outdoor 68F (could cool, but sensors closed)
Warm-day classification: hvac_mode=off normally, but indoor exceeds comfort_cool — comfort ceiling guard should fire

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification with indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F and sensors closed — in production, comfort ceiling guard fires AC at comfort_cool; simulator records classification_applied as baseline
